provenance: measured during the F0 GPT-OSS-120B campaign; sealed honest boundary. Numbers are transcribed, not re-derived.

parent.label: 120B
parent.architecture: gpt-oss-moe: 36 layers x 128 experts x top-k4, hidden/intermediate 2880, GQA 64/8

boundary: sub-bit uniform AND treated both collapsed on a real forward. No frontier selected. Salvage direction is organ inversion.

winners.name: vq_d32_k65536
winners.note: best measured space-filling gain at fixed rate

gate.note: qualitative at F0; the numeric gate_up vs down_only pair was measured at F1

down.note: tolerates more rate pressure than mlp1

organ_sensitivity.inversion: mlp1/gate+up is the SENSITIVE organ; mlp2/down tolerates more

routing.verdict: routing-frequency allocation is ALIVE but needs ~1000 calibration tokens; 88 is not enough

activation.verdict: experts mutually orthogonal; zero exploitable inter-expert redundancy

result.reason: both sub-bit candidates collapsed on a real forward

lessons.detail: source decoder must handle the packed MoE expert blocks directly

storage.mode: release source after harvest; re-downloadable from pinned revision

lessons.detail: source released after harvest; recoverable from openai/gpt-oss-120b @ b5c939de

assumptions.statement: entropy coding trained PQ indices is negligible
post hoc scalar gain correction is pinned at 1.0
assumptions.evidence: k-means recon is a conditional mean; residual orthogonal to recon
salvage direction after both sub-bit candidates collapsed

assumptions.statement: higher dimensional VQ improves rel_error at fixed rate
row-norm stratification recovers the collapsed gate/up rows
assumptions.evidence: 94 pct of gate/up rows collapse onto ONE codeword; row norms span 1e-5 to 0.91; untested

assumptions.statement: a large expert cache accelerates the pass
assumptions.evidence: 0 evictions, RAM 70 to 18 GB, swap free 906MB

higher_dimensional_vq_helped.evidence: rel_error falls monotonically with VQ dimension at fixed rate

row_norm_stratification_helped.evidence: 94 pct of gate/up rows collapse onto one codeword

quality_domains_collapsing_first.evidence: both sub-bit candidates collapsed on a real forward

methods.name: row-norm stratification
methods.evidence: 94 pct of gate/up rows collapse onto one codeword
